_meta.purpose: Hand-curated seed of comparable awarded contracts for media-production tender scope (video / drone / timelapse / photography / event coverage).
_meta.production_note: The production Historical Analyst queries the TED API (https://ted.europa.eu/api/v3.0/notices) directly. This file is a clearly-labelled placeholder for the demo: realistic structure and procurement-plausible numbers, but contracting authority names are generic placeholders rather than real entities. Switching to live TED is a contained next step — the seed loader returns the same ComparableTender shape regardless of source.

comparables.title: Audiovisual production framework for infrastructure project communications
comparables.scope_summary: Multi-year framework covering video production, drone footage, photography, and event coverage for capital-project communications. Two-supplier ranked award. Nationwide scope.
comparables.notes: Bundled video + drone + photography scope, ranked-multiple award. Moderate response pool.

comparables.title: Drone aerial photography and survey services framework
comparables.scope_summary: Drone aerial photography and timelapse survey for major infrastructure projects, nationwide. Specialist drone-only scope; no studio video production.
comparables.notes: Unbundled drone-specialist scope — smaller, more focused respondent pool.

comparables.title: Promotional video and content production services framework
comparables.scope_summary: Promotional video production: interviews, stills, editing, voiceover, for public-facing campaigns. No drone, no timelapse, no ISL.
comparables.notes: Studio video production scope — broadly accessible, large bidder pool, long evaluation.

comparables.title: Multimedia production framework including Irish-language and ISL accessibility
comparables.scope_summary: Multi-year framework covering video, photography, animation, ISL interpretation, and Irish-language content. Single supplier per call-off.
comparables.notes: Includes ISL and Irish-language requirements similar to drone tender; medium bidder pool.

comparables.title: Long-duration timelapse construction documentation services
comparables.scope_summary: 6-12 month timelapse documentation of major capital construction projects across multiple nationwide sites.
comparables.notes: Highly specialised — small pool of timelapse-capable suppliers.

comparables.title: Combined drone, video, photography, and event coverage framework
comparables.scope_summary: Bundled framework covering drone footage, studio video, vox-pop interviews, stills photography, event coverage, and multilingual subtitling. Two-supplier ranked award. Nationwide.
comparables.notes: Highly comparable bundled scope; large response volume; long evaluation. The closest match in the seed.
